word: H1763 - דְּחַל - dᵉchal - deh-khal' - Make afraid

sections.paragraph:
Original: דּחל

Transliteration: dechal

Phonetic: deh-khal'

BDB Definition:

  1. to fear
    1. (Peal)
      1. to fear
      2. terrible (passive participle)
    2. (Pael) to cause to be afraid, make afraid

Origin: corresponding to H2119

TWOT entry: 2672

Part(s) of speech: Verb
